definition: A hindrance or obstruction in doing something.
example: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way.

definition: The quality or state of being tranquil; calmness; peacefulness.
example: You have power over your mind - not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.

definition: Behavior showing high moral standards; a good or useful quality of a thing.
example: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.

definition: The ability to make considered decisions or come to sensible conclusions.
example: Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact. Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.

definition: The development of events beyond a person's control, regarded as determined by a supernatural power.
example: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together, but do so with all your heart.

definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness.
example: Choose not to be harmed — and you won’t feel harmed. Don’t feel harmed — and you haven’t been.

definition: A view or judgment formed about something, not necessarily based on fact or knowledge.
example: Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact. Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.

definition: A particular attitude toward or way of regarding something; a point of view.
example: Everything we see is a perspective, not the truth.

definition: The action of consenting to receive or undertake something offered; agreement to an offer or proposal.
example: Accept the things to which fate binds you, and love the people with whom fate brings you together, but do so with all your heart.

definition: The state of being subject to death; the quality or state of being mortal.
example: It is not death that a man should fear, but he should fear never beginning to live.

definition: The action of inflicting hurt or harm on someone for an injury or wrong suffered at their hands.
example: The best revenge is to be unlike him who performed the injury.
Do not act as if you had ten thousand years to live. Death hangs over you. While you live, while it is in your power, be good.
